name: canonicals_at_0212
command: for f in MANIFEST.json CHANGELOG.md VERSION CLAUDE.md CLAUDE-iteration.md CLAUDE-run.md GEMINI.md GEMINI-iteration.md GEMINI-run.md COMPATIBILITY.md pyproject.toml; do grep -q "0.2.12" "$f" || echo "MISSING: $f"; done | grep -c MISSING || true

name: gemini_iteration_md_has_sections
command: for s in "AcceptanceCheck" "events/aho_event_log" "session boundaries" "MCP-first"; do grep -qi "$s" GEMINI-iteration.md || echo "MISSING: $s"; done | grep -c MISSING || true

name: all_daemons_healthy
command: python -c "from aho.acceptance import daemon_healthy, run_check; units=[\"aho-openclaw\",\"aho-telegram\",\"aho-harness-watcher\",\"aho-otel-collector\",\"aho-jaeger\",\"aho-dashboard\",\"aho-nemoclaw\"]; results=[run_check(daemon_healthy(u)) for u in units]; print(sum(r.passed for r in results))"

name: decisions_contains_11_pillars_verbatim
command: grep -c "The human holds the keys" artifacts/iterations/0.2.12/decisions.md
